name: task-swarm
description: Multi-agent orchestration driven by a pipeline.yml: semantic task groups with cross-group concurrency, fork coders, and per-group reviewer + validator loops. v0.5–0.8 lands FIX-1/2 + 方案 D + inbox sentinel + M7 init dedupe + M2 run-loop + M3 pipeline-end validator. **0.9.2 撤销方案 A**：round 5/6 实测证明 Claude Code subagent 在架构层面无 Skill tool 权限（persona md `tools:` 字段对 host-level tool 如 Skill 不生效；0.9.1 添加是 no-op）。删 3 persona md「## superpowers 集成」段 + tools 字段去 Skill；保留方案 B（_prompt.py 渲染 task.md 「## 开发纪律 (范式参考)」段，按 role × mode 列出 4 skill 名作为**范式标识**而非 invoke 目标），subagent 用 native Bash/Read/Edit/Write 跑流程即可拿到 superpowers 90% 价值（round 4 16/16 + round 5 3/3 native fallback 0 差错实测）。Requires codemap-aimemory 0.4.3+ (codemap knowledge CLI).
